productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Response Cushion White Sports Shoes
description: Take running to the next level with these Response Cushion shoes from adidas. The sleek design with the light-weight structure and high performance features helps you run better for longer. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperAir mesh uppers with synthetic overlays for excellent ventillationadidas patented 3-Stripe design on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performanceLace-ups for snug FitMesh tongue for greater breathabilityCushioned collar for greater comfortBrand name embossed on the tongue and on the heelMidsoleRemovable footbed that can be replaced with a medical orthoticadiPRENE® in the forefoot maintains propulsion and efficiencyMolded responsive EVA sockliner for anatomical fit and great step-in comfortOutsoleFORMOTION technology on the outsole adapts to the ground to ensure the smoothest, most comfortable run possibleadiPRENE® under the heel with a scooped out cavity gives superior cushioning on impactadiWEAR® outsole with suction lugs on the forefoot and heel offers better grip and high-wear durabilityTORSION® provides midfoot supportFlex grooves provide greater flexibility to the feetshoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
